description: Field battle (direct attack, not a rally) , battle 2026-06-07 21:33:44. Pins Ambusher target-order fallback: attacker t10fc8 lancers have Ambusher (tier 7+) and the game report shows it triggering, but the defender fields ZERO marksmen. Proves ambush order falls back to infantry before lancers when marksmen are absent, i.e. order marksman -> infantry -> lancer, matching config troop_skills.json Ambusher. All hero skills level 5 (skills 1-3 only, widget skill 4 not relevant, no rally/garrison engagement).
